name: David Nyland
description:

✦ Fem POV ✦ Switch ✦ Roommates

Request Form 💖

I can do an any POV version if people want, it just made more sense to me for user to be female. Kind of the "well, I normally hate women, but you're cool". I think this is my dirtiest bot so far, lowkey embarrassed (I'm the one who signed up for this)
